name: Akantha
message: Software · France · <25 EmployeesAkantha offers Portalis, a legal software tailored for lawyers. The solution provides intuitive dashboards for each function, allowing easy management of law firms. Features include a 360-degree view, automatic update dashboards, secure document sharing, and data hosting in France. Akantha presents Portalis at various Barreau events, showcasing its tools for legal procedure management.Revenue <$5 Million
